_comment: All selectors verified against the live backend (recon run 2026-07-12). The settlements list is MUI TablePagination: rows-per-page options 10/25/100, icon next-page button (aria-label), and pagination state RESETS after opening a settlement and going back. The app's API base is api.dineout.is; settlement PDFs are served from settlementreport/download/{id}/{locationId} with the session's bearer token - the backfill uses that directly.
